5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (src/main.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.dnscope/blob/master/io-package.json).

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#73] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.dnscope/issues/73)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.dnscope/blob/master/package.json)

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.dnscope/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.dnscope/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
